/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-deprecated -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/tinyXML/tinyxml2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/utils/Figure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/utils/Config.cpp.o -o engine  -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -framework Cocoa
